raw_source.title: [江浙沪] Unifra is looking for ZK engineer
raw_source.body:
## About

Unifra build mutil-rollup & feature-rich block explorer for rollups. Currently, we publish the first supported rollup on our explorer--Scroll Testnet.

Unifra is a Web 3 blockchain development infrastructure provider. By providing node RPC and cloud-based API services, it helps developers quickly access and utilize blockchain networks and easily build Web 3 applications. Meanwhile, Unifra shaping the future of Rollup Tooling and Infra for the world of Web 3 through series of Open Source products on Layer 2.

## Responsibilities

We are looking for a zero-knowledge proof engineer to join a startup using zero-knowledge proofs to scale smart contract applications. You will implement and deploy cryptographic code for zero-knowledge proof generation.

## Requirements

Strong background in math/cryptography/CS, or strong problem-solving skills and interest in zero-knowledge proofs.
Proficiency in Rust, Golang, or Python. We work primarily in Rust, but prior experience is not mandatory.
Security and ownership mindset.
Prior experience with Ethereum, low level optimization of cryptographic code, or zero-knowledge proofs are all helpful but not required.

## Nice to Haves

## Job Nature

- Full-time or not: Full-time
- Remote or not: Preferablly in Shanghai & Nanjing, but not a must

## Salary and Benefits
20K-40K, provide competitive salary
This item must be filled in, otherwise the Rebase official account and other media channels may not be forwarded.

## Work Location
Flexible
## Contact
hr@unifra.io

## About

Unifra build mutil-rollup & feature-rich block explorer for rollups. Currently, we publish the first supported rollup on our explorer--Scroll Testnet.

Unifra is a Web 3 blockchain development infrastructure provider. By providing node RPC and cloud-based API services, it helps developers quickly access and utilize blockchain networks and easily build Web 3 applications. Meanwhile, Unifra shaping the future of Rollup Tooling and Infra for the world of Web 3 through series of Open Source products on Layer 2.

## Responsibilities

We are looking for a zero-knowledge proof engineer to join a startup using zero-knowledge proofs to scale smart contract applications. You will implement and deploy cryptographic code for zero-knowledge proof generation.

## Requirements

Strong background in math/cryptography/CS, or strong problem-solving skills and interest in zero-knowledge proofs.
Proficiency in Rust, Golang, or Python. We work primarily in Rust, but prior experience is not mandatory.
Security and ownership mindset.
Prior experience with Ethereum, low level optimization of cryptographic code, or zero-knowledge proofs are all helpful but not required.

- Remote or not: Preferablly in Shanghai & Nanjing, but not a must
